# infisical_identity (Data Source)

Look up an Infisical identity by its ID. Returns the identity's details including its name, organization role, auth methods, and metadata. Only Machine Identity authentication is supported for this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    infisical = {
      # version = <latest version>
      source = "infisical/infisical"
    }
  }
}

provider "infisical" {
  host = "https://app.infisical.com" # Only required if using self hosted instance of Infisical, default is https://app.infisical.com
  auth = {
    universal = {
      client_id     = "<machine-identity-client-id>"
      client_secret = "<machine-identity-client-secret>"
    }
  }
}

data "infisical_identity" "example" {
  id = "<identity-id>"
}

output "identity" {
  value = data.infisical_identity.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the identity to look up

### Read-Only

- `auth_modes` (List of String) The authentication methods configured on the identity
- `custom_role_id` (String) The ID of the custom organization role assigned to the identity. Null if the identity has a predefined role.
- `has_delete_protection` (Boolean) Whether the identity has delete protection enabled
- `metadata` (Attributes List) The metadata associated with the identity (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `name` (String) The name of the identity
- `org_id` (String) The ID of the organization the identity belongs to
- `role` (String) The organization role assigned to the identity. For custom roles, this is the role slug.

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The key of the metadata entry
- `value` (String) The value of the metadata entry
